metadata.ogTitle: Give Kids A Smile ADA Foundation - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.author: brienhsu
metadata.ogDescription: Sunday, February 26, 2017 On Friday 2/24/2017 I volunteered for the ADA Give Kids a Smile Program at a preschool in Monrovia. Unfortunately I was the only non-staff volunteer dentist to participate. I know for a fact that they were doing mass emails to find other dentists to volunteer – I just feel an indescribable […]
